# sevalla_project (Resource)

Manages a Sevalla project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sevalla_project" "example" {
  display_name = "my-project"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the project.

### Read-Only

- `company_id` (String) The company ID that owns the project.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the project was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the project.
- `name` (String) The system-generated name of the project.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the project was last updated.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import sevalla_project.example a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890
```
